meaning: n.斯瓦希里语(属班图语系东班图语族,系东非坦桑尼亚、肯尼亚等地通用的语言)
examples: Kwanzaa is a Kiswahili word meaning "the first fruits of the harvest".
Kwanzaa is a Kiswahili word meaning the first fruits of the harvest.
The East African language of Kiswahili was chosen as an official language of Kwanzaa because it is a non-tribal language spoken by a large portion of the African population.
Kiswahili is spoken most noticeably here on the coast, reflecting a strong sense of common identity.
In Spanish, probably best expressed when working together in solidaridad, and in Kiswahili, huduma or simply, service.
